description: Append-only audit record written by the cloud flow after each source check. Never manually edited.

columns.name: RunId
columns.description: GUID correlating all log entries for one VIN check run

columns.name: Source
columns.description: Which external source this log entry covers

columns.name: Detail
columns.description: Additional context, error message, or extracted text snippet

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: UTC timestamp when this log entry was created

columns.name: FlowRunUrl
columns.description: Direct link to the Power Automate cloud flow run for traceability

permissions.note: Do NOT grant Edit or Delete to any user. Append-only via flow connection only.
